report.summary: Cycle-close v11: 142 TS errors across 5 files (4 learn pages + structured-data.examples.ts) — up from 15 last cycle due to unescaped JSX in 4 new learn guides. 6/6 API route files present. Cache TTLs properly configured (fear-greed 600s, trending 300s, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 300s). 529 published slugs, 426 with page.tsx (103 legacy gaps unchanged). 2 new untracked learn pages (Grayscale HYPE ETF, Nasdaq Tokenized Equities) ready to commit. 13 modified + 16 untracked files pending. git index.lock still present. No new deploys since batch commit 21aaf5b.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 529 published slugs, 426 with page.tsx files — 103 legacy slugs still missing (unchanged)
142 TypeScript errors total across 5 files: crypto-arbitrage-strategies (4 errors), crypto-index-funds (2), institutional-crypto-adoption (2), lido-v3-stvaults (119), structured-data.examples (15)
All 4 new learn page errors are JSX escaping issues (unescaped '>' and '$' chars) — fixable with simple escaping
lido-v3-stvaults has the most errors (119) — likely a malformed JSX block at line 865
2 new untracked learn pages built this cycle: grayscale-hype-etf-defi-guide, nasdaq-tokenized-equities-trading-guide-2026
Production site cannot be reached from sandbox (egress blocked) — relying on last cycle's 13/13 critical page checks
No new Vercel deploy since commit 21aaf5b — new pages not yet live

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API route files present: fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, prices, defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified in source: fear-greed s-maxage=600 + SWR=1200, trending s-maxage=300 + SWR=600, market-metrics s-maxage=60 + SWR=120, market-dominance s-maxage=300 + SWR=600
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/market-metrics was 404 in production last cycle — cannot verify fix from sandbox
CARRY-OVER [P2]: Fear & Greed data was 2 days stale (Mar 23) as of last cycle — upstream API or cache issue
Rate limiter middleware still only applied to /api/health — other routes unprotected (pre-existing, low priority)
No new API routes added this cycle; notifications/feed route created but untracked

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deploy: batch commit 21aaf5b (170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
No new deploy triggered this cycle — 13 modified + 16 untracked files pending commit
git index.lock still present — blocks new commits until manually cleared
Local build cannot run (sandbox OOM) — Vercel build is source of truth
New notifications API route (src/app/api/notifications/feed/) and data file created but not committed
globals.css modified — could affect visual rendering across all pages (needs visual QA post-deploy)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED this cycle: 2 new learn pages (Grayscale HYPE ETF, Nasdaq Tokenized Equities), notifications feed API stub, community social drafts v10-v11, 4 SVG social cards
CARRY-OVER for next cycle: (1) Fix 142 TS errors in 4 learn pages, (2) Clear index.lock and commit pending files, (3) Verify /api/market-metrics 404 fix in prod, (4) Investigate F&G data staleness
BLOCKERS requiring Jefe's attention: git index.lock prevents commits — needs manual 'rm .git/index.lock' or force clear
Published page count: 529 slugs (+1 from last cycle). Total page.tsx: ~1,174 (+2 new untracked)
Day 72 of launch. 59 agent runs today. Thu Mar 27 convergence day approaching: $14.16B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings
